112
artifact_summary: Screenshot of a SCADA faceplate for Sump Pump No.1 constant speed motor showing configurable time delay parameters.
artifact_blurb: A SCADA system interface faceplate monitoring a constant speed motor designated as 'Sump Pump No.1', featuring a configuration panel for critical operational time delays including 'Cold Restart Time Frame' and 'First Fault Restart Delay', with values specified in minutes and seconds.
